summary: Phase B-2 E2E verification complete. All 16 tests PASS: (1) Technician Portal - 10 endpoints tested including login, dashboard, tickets, start-work, productivity, attendance, leave, payroll, and access control. (2) Financial Reports - 6 endpoints tested: Trial Balance (335,565 balanced), P&L (Income: 36,750, Expenses: 217,200), Balance Sheet (Assets: 26,165, balanced), Account Ledger, Chart of Accounts (48 accounts), Journal Entries (28 entries).
critical_code_review_comments: double_entry_service.py Lines 1488-1491: P&L filter correctly includes lowercase account types: 'income', 'expense', 'revenue', 'Revenue'
double_entry_service.py Lines 1530: Income classification includes 'income', 'revenue', 'Revenue' - handles lowercase from seed data
double_entry_service.py Lines 1593-1600: Balance sheet filter includes lowercase 'asset', 'liability', 'equity'
double_entry_service.py Lines 1636-1649: Asset/liability classification handles both title-case (AccountType enum) and lowercase (seed data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Technician portal uses standard JWT auth with role=technician. STKT-013 ticket was started during testing and is now in work_in_progress status. Financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheet) now correctly read from journal_entries collection with lowercase account_type values in seed data. The fix was adding lowercase values to $in filters in double_entry_service.py.
